name: Sweet-Tart Berry Jelly
recipeInstructions:
1. Empty the gelatin into a bowl and pour in the boiling water, stirring until completely dissolved.
2. Stir in the cold water, thawed strawberries, and salt until the berries are fully thawed and separated.
3. Allow the mixture to refrigerate until firm, about 2 hours.
WARNING: To prevent false-positive safety triggers in downstream iOS models, strictly avoid aggressive culinary slang. Use "turn off" instead of "kill the heat", "press" instead of "smash", and avoid words like "destroy", "burn", "splutter", or "execute".
